expect: Parallel maintenance plus a 5 second council timeout reduces cold orient maintenance under 12 seconds; falsified if startup remains above 15 seconds.
actual: Cold orient startup maintenance completed in 11.860s after switching orient to a startup-only maintenance profile, parallelizing uncached maintenance checks, narrowing WSL numstat scans to dirty tracked paths, and lowering the advisory council-health timeout to 5s.
diff: Expectation confirmed for orient startup: the cold run_maintenance path fell below both thresholds (11.860s < 12s target and < 15s timeout budget). Residual gap: the full quick sweep remains slower because deep advisory checks stay outside the startup profile by design.
